description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the nicosingh/rpi-dind:latest Docker image and define two stages: build-branch and build-master, with variables DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME, DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY, GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME, and GITLAB_REGISTRY. In the build-branch stage add a branch-docker_hub job (tagged rpi) that runs on all branches except master, executing `docker login -u nicosingh -p $DOCKERHUB_NICOSINGH_PASSWORD $DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY`, `docker build -t $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .`, and `docker push $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME`. Also in build-branch add a branch-gitlab job (tagged rpi) with the same except rule, running `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $GITLAB_REGISTRY`, `docker build -t $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .`, and `docker push $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME`. In the build-master stage add a master-docker_hub job (tagged rpi) that runs only on the master branch, performing `docker login -u nicosingh -p $DOCKERHUB_NICOSINGH_PASSWORD $DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY`, `docker build -t $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:latest .`, and `docker push $DOCKERHUB_IMAGE_NAME:latest`. Finally add a master-gitlab job (tagged rpi) that also runs only on master, executing `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $GITLAB_REGISTRY`, `docker build -t $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:latest .`, and `docker push $GITLAB_IMAGE_NAME:latest`.
